name: Uber Zap (console)
sampleLines: 2024-04-28T04:02:05Z ERROR Failed to connect to backend
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/zap_console_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). Matches the default `zapcore.NewConsoleEncoder` output: ISO-8601 timestamp + capitalised level + optional caller + message + trailing structured fields. See go.uber.org/zap NewProductionConfig for the encoder defaults.
